output_summary: Moved API call to shared service: added upsertUserAttribute in packages/shared and wired verification-page to use it via occupationMutation; updated handleUpdateOccupation to send profession_info as value; added audit log entry

files_changed.summary: Added upsertUserAttribute(payload) that posts to upsertUserAttribute.html with form-encoded params using configApi.post
Wired occupation mutation to use shared upsertUserAttribute; updated handleUpdateOccupation to format value as id:name when possible.
